# ClubManager Module Status

## Process rule

- `clubmanager-inventory.md` is the product source of truth.
- `module-status.md` is the operational command center.
- Cleanup and testing rows must reference Inventory ID.
- No Inventory ID = no cleanup, no test assignment, no Verified update.

## Release focus

- R1 Tenant Production: Tenant App core modules for secretary/club owner
- R1.5 Player Portal: Player Portal rollout and cleanup
- R2 Admin Platform: Admin Platform polish
- R3 Platform Billing: Platform Billing polish
- Later: Notifications, advanced reports, premium modules, non-R1 features
